stories.title: Shakira & Burna Boy Release Official World Cup 2026 Song 'Dai Dai'
stories.desc: Colombian superstar Shakira and Nigerian singer Burna Boy unveiled 'Dai Dai' as the official FIFA World Cup 2026 song, blending Afrobeats, reggaeton and world beats with a multilingual anthem celebrating unity.

stories.title: Lionel Messi Named in Argentina's World Cup 2026 Preliminary Squad
stories.desc: Argentina announced its preliminary roster for the World Cup title defense on May 11, with Lionel Messi included as Bosnia and Herzegovina became the first team to announce their full squad the same day.

stories.title: France Announces World Cup Squad: Camavinga and Kolo Muani Miss Out
stories.desc: France coach Didier Deschamps revealed his final World Cup squad with notable omissions including Real Madrid's Eduardo Camavinga and PSG's Kolo Muani, as Les Bleus prepare for the tournament.

stories.title: Panini's Record-Breaking 2026 World Cup Sticker Album Launches
stories.desc: Panini released its biggest FIFA World Cup sticker album ever with 980 stickers across 112 pages, featuring all 48 teams. The collection launched April 28 at Wembley Stadium with exclusive Coca-Cola partnership stickers.

stories.title: Completing Panini World Cup 2026 Album Could Cost Over $2,000
stories.desc: Collectors may need more than 1,000 packs to complete the record 980-sticker Panini album without swapping duplicates, potentially costing over $2,000 according to Reuters estimates.

stories.title: FIFA Amends Tournament Rules, Exempts Players from Qualifying Suspensions
stories.desc: On May 8, FIFA's Council Bureau amended regulations so pending suspensions from qualifying red cards won't carry forward to the tournament, exempting Argentina's Otamendi, Ecuador's Caicedo and Qatar's Salman.
